prompt.content:
You are a spatial reasoning assistant analyzing a 3D scene image.
You will receive a list of objects visible in the image and a set of distance comparison questions.

For each question, compare 3D distances — either between two pairs of objects,
or from a common anchor object to two candidate objects.
Answer with exactly one of: "<" (first pair/candidate closer), "~=" (approximately equal), ">" (first pair/candidate farther).

Respond ONLY with a JSON array. Each element must have "qid" and "answer" (a string: "<", "~=", or ">").

Example:
[{"qid": "qrr_0001", "answer": "<"}, {"qid": "qrr_0002", "answer": "~="}]

content.text:
Objects in the image:
  - obj_0: small purple metal cylinder
  - obj_1: small brown rubber cube
  - obj_2: large green rubber cylinder
  - obj_3: small yellow metal cylinder
  - obj_4: large blue metal cube
  - obj_5: large gray rubber cube
  - obj_6: small green metal cube
  - obj_7: small cyan rubber cylinder
  - obj_8: small purple rubber cylinder
  - obj_9: small brown rubber cube

Questions:
[qrr_0281] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0282] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0283] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0284] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0285] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0286] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0287] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0288] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0289] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0290] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0291] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_7 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0292] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_7 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0293] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_8 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0294] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_3. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0295] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0296] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0297] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0298] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0299] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0300] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >

raw_response:
I need to analyze the 3D positions of objects in this scene and compare distances between pairs of objects.

Let me first estimate the positions of each object based on the image:

- obj_0 (small purple metal cylinder): right side, middle area
- obj_1 (small brown rubber cube): left-center area, back
- obj_2 (large green rubber cylinder): front-center
- obj_3 (small yellow metal cylinder): back-center area
- obj_4 (large blue metal cube): center-back area
- obj_5 (large gray rubber cube): right side
- obj_6 (small green metal cube): far left
- obj_7 (small cyan rubber cylinder): left-front area
- obj_8 (small purple rubber cylinder): back-right area
- obj_9 (small brown rubber cube): right-center area

Let me estimate coordinates (x, y, z) where x=left-right, y=depth (front-back), z=height:
- obj_0 (purple metal cyl): (7, 5, 1)
- obj_1 (brown cube left): (3, 4, 1)
- obj_2 (green cyl): (5, 8, 1.5)
- obj_3 (yellow cyl): (5, 2, 1)
- obj_4 (blue cube): (6, 3, 1)
- obj_5 (gray cube): (8, 5, 1.5)
- obj_6 (green metal cube): (1, 5, 1)
- obj_7 (cyan cyl): (3, 7, 1)
- obj_8 (purple rubber cyl): (6, 2, 1)
- obj_9 (brown cube right): (7, 4, 1)

Distance obj_1 to obj_4: sqrt((6-3)²+(3-4)²) = sqrt(9+1) ≈ 3.16

Now computing all required distances:

obj_3 to obj_7: sqrt((5-3)²+(2-7)²) = sqrt(4+25) ≈ 5.39
obj_3 to obj_8: sqrt((5-6)²+(2-2)²) = sqrt(1) ≈ 1
obj_3 to obj_9: sqrt((5-7)²+(2-4)²) = sqrt(4+4) ≈ 2.83
obj_5 to obj_6: sqrt((8-1)²+(5-5)²) = 7
obj_5 to obj_7: sqrt((8-3)²+(5-7)²) = sqrt(25+4) ≈ 5.39
obj_5 to obj_8: sqrt((8-6)²+(5-2)²) = sqrt(4+9) ≈ 3.61
obj_5 to obj_9: sqrt((8-7)²+(5-4)²) = sqrt(1+1) ≈ 1.41
obj_6 to obj_7: sqrt((1-3)²+(5-7)²) = sqrt(4+4) ≈ 2.83
obj_6 to obj_8: sqrt((1-6)²+(5-2)²) = sqrt(25+9) ≈ 5.83
obj_6 to obj_9: sqrt((1-7)²+(5-4)²) = sqrt(36+1) ≈ 6.08
obj_7 to obj_8: sqrt((3-6)²+(7-2)²) = sqrt(9+25) ≈ 5.83
obj_7 to obj_9: sqrt((3-7)²+(7-4)²) = sqrt(16+9) ≈ 5
obj_8 to obj_9: sqrt((6-7)²+(2-4)²) = sqrt(1+4) ≈ 2.24
obj_1 to obj_5: sqrt((3-8)²+(4-5)²) = sqrt(25+1) ≈ 5.1
obj_2 to obj_3: sqrt((5-5)²+(8-2)²) = 6
obj_2 to obj_4: sqrt((5-6)²+(8-3)²) = sqrt(1+25) ≈ 5.1
obj_2 to obj_6: sqrt((5-1)²+(8-5)²) = sqrt(16+9) = 5
obj_2 to obj_7: sqrt((5-3)²+(8-7)²) = sqrt(4+1) ≈ 2.24
obj_2 to obj_8: sqrt((5-6)²+(8-2)²) = sqrt(1+36) ≈ 6.08
obj_2 to obj_9: sqrt((5-7)²+(8-4)²) = sqrt(4+16) ≈ 4.47
obj_3 to obj_4: sqrt((5-6)²+(2-3)²) = sqrt(1+1) ≈ 1.41
